use_cases: Displaying and clustering multiple geographic markers on an interactive map
Enabling users to click markers for location details via popups
Providing location-based exploration with fly-to animations
Supporting layer toggling for different data overlays
Rendering custom markers, circles, polygons, and polylines for varied geographic data visualization
ai_summary: A React-Leaflet based interactive map component that renders customizable markers, clusters, and geographic overlays with support for user interactions including clicking for popups, location finding with fly-to animations, and layer toggling. Built with react-leaflet-cluster for marker clustering and includes custom control components for enhanced map navigation.
